scripts.perf:load: npm run fixture:rekordbox && npm run build && cargo run -q -p playcircle-rekordbox --example load_perf && PLAYCIRCLE_PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER=preview playwright test tests/perf/initial-load.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.perf:library: npm run fixture:rekordbox && npm run build && PLAYCIRCLE_PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER=preview playwright test tests/perf/library.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.perf:sort: npm run fixture:rekordbox && npm run build && PLAYCIRCLE_PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER=preview playwright test tests/perf/sort.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.perf:audio: npm run fixture:rekordbox && cargo run -q -p playcircle-audio --example load_playback_perf -- "$(node scripts/first-existing-rekordbox-audio.mjs)"
scripts.perf:decode: npm run fixture:rekordbox && cargo run --release -q -p playcircle-audio --example decode_perf -- "$(node scripts/first-existing-rekordbox-audio.mjs)"
